headline: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. (SLDE) Soars 5.7%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. (SLDE) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
